creator: ernst@jollem.com
text:
Ok, here's another attempt to get us a jakarta-ant port. This one will
install the binary version of Jakarta Ant 1.2, the latest final build
release at the moment (Feb 23, 2001). I tried one of the previously
submitted ant ports, but it didn't install since I didn't have "javac"
in my path. This version has the Linux JDK 1.3.0 as a runtime
dependency. It will just copy everything to /usr/local/jakarta-ant1.2/.

If anyone has any problems with a port of Ant, then please let us know,
so we can discuss this.

--
Ernst de Haan
ernst@jollem.com
